content.en:
Ye Tian went to Qi Blood Heavenly Tower to test his combat power, and he could now easily break through the fourth layer.

This means that his strength is not weak in the second tier of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, at least it belongs to the middle ranks.

This is the benefit of his current life level being raised to 105, as well as the benefits of improving his cultivation.

However, after raising the health level to 105, it is even more difficult to increase to 106.

According to his understanding, the limit of the life level of the general Ninefold Ancestor is 100, although the Ninefold Ancestor like him can break the boundary, but the limit of the life level is 108, and after the life level reaches 108, if you want to continue to improve, you must step into the boundary and achieve the strongest Ninefold Ancestor.

In other words, if the Ninefold Ancestor wants to become the strongest Ninefold Ancestor, he must break the 108 boundary of the life level.

If the life level does not reach 108, then it is not qualified to attack the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor.

In the Silent Black Sea, there were too few Ninefold Primordial Ancestors who had reached 108 Life Level, so even if these Ninefold Primordial Ancestors obtained a treasure like the Eternal Flint Stone, they would not be able to help them reach the Strongest Ninefold Ancestor.

Of course, if the life level reaches 108, even if it is relatively weak in other aspects, and its combat power is only ranked in the second sequence of the Ninefold Ancestor, then it is still qualified to attack the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor.

It's just that even if such a Ninefold Origin Ancestor succeeds in breaking through, it can be regarded as a relatively weak one among the strongest Ninefold Origin Ancestors.

Which kind of supreme ninefold ancestor is extremely powerful, that is, the immeasurable path cultivation has reached the extreme realm, the immeasurable will is far more than 100, the physical body is incomparably powerful, and he has an incomparably terrifying supreme immeasurable dao control technique.

This kind of Xeon Ninefold Origin Ancestor is really powerful, far beyond the ordinary Xeon Ninefold Ancestor.

The following years were very peaceful, Ye Tianan practiced quietly, although the speed of progress was slow, but at least he was still improving.

He now only hopes that he will comprehend the Immeasurable Dao to the Dacheng realm as soon as possible, and then master the Infinite Dao control technique of the small consummation level, so that his strength will skyrocket significantly, and he is expected to rank among the Ninefold Ancestors of the first rank.

......

Primordial Ancient Sea.

this day.

Ten top tribes, including the Nine Wings Tribe, the Taiwu Tribe, the Ancient Emperor Tribe, and the Hades Saint Tribe, gathered here, and they represented the ten most powerful tribes in the entire Primordial Ancient Sea.

Each tribe has at least a few to the enhancement level, and the strength is not too different.

Now, the supreme strengtheners of their ten tribes are gathered here to discuss a big matter.

At this time, Wu Wu, the supreme strengthener of the Taiwu tribe, spoke: "The intersection period is coming soon, this is a great opportunity, and it is also our glimmer of hope, do you have any plans?"

"The intersection period is very important, but the area of the intersection is different every time, and I don't know what the opportunity is, if there is no big opportunity, I don't think there is any need to start a war. "

"Yes, if there is a great opportunity, then even if it costs a lot, you have to grab it. But now we have an extra group of enemies!"

"One more enemy, could it be that the guys who cut off the forbidden area?"

"It's those guys who cut off the forbidden area, thanks to the Nine Wings Tribe, who brought us a bunch of enemies!"

At this time, the Nine Wings Tribe's supreme strengthening-level powerhouse, True Wing, said coldly: "What do you mean, even if we don't cooperate with the Truncation Forbidden Zone, there will be other tribes that will cooperate with them, this is inevitable." Moreover, I also hope to cut off the forbidden area and clash with the five top powers of the Silent Black Sea, who knows that they did not fight. "

"Well, this matter is over, and there is no point in saying more. Besides, even if there are more cut-off zones, we are not afraid. "

"In short, when the meeting time comes, our tribes of the Primordial Ancient Sea must unite in order to gain an advantage. Everyone wants to go further, if the Silent Black Sea's Supreme Ninefold Ancestor gains the benefits and takes the first step, it will be the end of us!"

Subsequently, these supreme reinforcements prepared for the intersection period, and discussed the future plans one by one.

At the same time, the Nine Towers, the Ten Dao Mountains, the Demon Sea, the Secret Realm, and the Divine Blood Sect's Supreme Nine Ancestors all gathered together and were also discussing the matters of the convergence period.

This is a matter involving the Silent Black Sea and the Primordial Ancient Sea, and it is also an important matter related to their future, even if any Supreme Ninefold Ancestor has been in retreat for an endless time, he will be out of the realm at this time.

Like those tribes in the primordial ancient sea, these five forces are also joining forces, no matter what contradictions there were before, but at this time they must join forces, otherwise they will not be able to compete with those tribes at all.

What's more, they also have to be threatened with the cut-off of the box, so they also have to keep an eye on the cut-off box.

......

"Meetup?"

Ye Tian got the news from Dongchen Dao Ancestor and was immediately shocked.

At this time, not only him, but all the Ninefold Ancestors of the entire Nine-Fold Building got the news.

It's just that most of the Ninefold Primordial Ancestors have experienced the Convergence Period, so they understand what the Convergence Period is, only Ye Tian's time to become a Ninefold Ancestor is too short, so he has not experienced the Convergence Period.

"Lord Dongchen Daozu, the confluence period refers to the convergence of the Primordial Ancient Sea and the Silent Black Sea, could it be that war will break out because of this?"

Ye Tian asked.

Dongchen Daozu shook his head, "Naturally, it's not just that, if it's just a part of the territory, it can be negotiated peacefully, and there will not necessarily be a war, but this time it's not just the Silent Black Sea and the Primordial Ancient Sea, but also a strange territory." Strictly speaking, that unfamiliar territory collided with the primordial ancient sea and the silent black sea, causing the two sides to converge. This intersection period will not be too long, but it will not be short either. At present, a total of thirteen times have been born in the intersection period, and each time a new Supreme Ninefold Ancestor will be born, and there will even be an opportunity for us to increase our strength greatly. Both we and the original antiquities are very convinced that there will be an opportunity for us to take this step in the intersection, so it is impossible for anyone to give up. "

"Take this step? Could it be that you are above the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor?"

Ye Tian asked in surprise.

Dongchen Daozu nodded, "Yes, this is this step, although this step is very difficult, but everyone feels that there is a possibility of a breakthrough, at present, there is already a Supreme Ninefold Ancestor on the Silent Black Sea who has taken half a step, and his strength is far beyond the ordinary Supreme Ninefold Ancestor, and he even has the ability to kill the weaker Ninefold Ancestor." "

"In addition, this is also the hope of you Ninefold Ancestors, no one knows what the chance will be, so if it is possible, I also recommend that you try it then!"

Listening to Dongchen Daozu's words, Ye Tian nodded slightly, and began to look forward to the intersection period in his heart.
